name: Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 56 ounces (two 28 ounce cans) Crushed Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy saucepan, heat the olive oil and butter over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, garlic, and carrot to the saucepan. Sauté until the carrot is soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients through the cayenne pepper. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add baking soda and stir well.
7. Serve over fettuccine topped with Parmesan cheese or steamed mussels sprinkled with fresh chopped parsley.
